prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical beachside portrait of a young East Asian woman kneeling on a soft bed beside an open ocean-view window on a bright tropical morning. She wears a wide frayed straw sunhat with long white lace ties, has dark brown hair in a loose side braid with wispy bangs, and gazes calmly off to the right with a natural, sunlit expression. Her outfit is a delicate pale pink floral sundress with thin straps and a deep gathered neckline, rendered as tasteful summer fashion. Add dappled shadows from the straw hat across her face, shoulders, arms, and dress, with glossy warm skin highlights. The bed has white sheets and a rumpled pink polka-dot blanket. Include exactly 2 cats resting on the bed in the lower left: one black-and-white cat partly behind her and one orange tabby sleeping in front. On the left edge, include a sheer white lace curtain with floral embroidery, softly backlit. Through the large window show turquoise ocean water, white surf, pale sand, a blue sky with puffy clouds, and a small palm-covered headland on the right. Use realistic DSLR-style photography, shallow-to-medium depth of field, crisp natural details, high dynamic range sunlight, relaxed tropical vacation mood, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical beachside portrait of a young East Asian woman kneeling on a soft bed beside an open ocean-view window on a bright tropical morning. She wears a wide frayed straw sunhat with long white lace ties, has dark brown hair in a loose side braid with wispy bangs, and gazes calmly off to the right with a natural, sunlit expression. Her outfit is a delicate pale pink floral sundress with thin straps and a deep gathered neckline, rendered as tasteful summer fashion. Add dappled shadows from the straw hat across her face, shoulders, arms, and dress, with glossy warm skin highlights. The bed has white sheets and a rumpled pink polka-dot blanket. Include exactly 2 cats resting on the bed in the lower left: one black-and-white cat partly behind her and one orange tabby sleeping in front. On the left edge, include a sheer white lace curtain with floral embroidery, softly backlit. Through the large window show turquoise ocean water, white surf, pale sand, a blue sky with puffy clouds, and a small palm-covered headland on the right. Use realistic DSLR-style photography, shallow-to-medium depth of field, crisp natural details, high dynamic range sunlight, relaxed tropical vacation mood, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级真实的竖版海滩肖像，画面中 一位年轻东亚女性 在明亮的热带清晨，跪在海景窗边柔软的床上。她戴着一顶宽大的磨边草编遮阳帽，帽檐系着长长的白色蕾丝带；留着 深棕色 的头发，编成松散的侧边麻花辫，留着轻薄的刘海；她神情自然地沐浴在阳光下，平静地望向右侧。她身着精致的 淡粉色碎花吊带裙，领口有深褶皱设计，呈现出优雅的夏日时尚感。草帽在她的脸庞、肩膀、手臂和裙子上投下斑驳的阴影，皮肤呈现出温暖且富有光泽的质感。床上铺着白色床单和一条褶皱的 粉色波点毯子。在左下方的床上放置 2 只猫：一只黑白花色的猫部分遮挡在她的身后，另一只橘色虎斑猫正在前方熟睡。画面左侧边缘加入带有花卉刺绣的半透明白色蕾丝窗帘，呈现柔和的逆光效果。透过大窗户可以看到绿松石色的海水、白色的浪花、浅色的沙滩、蓝天白云，以及右侧长满棕榈树的小海角。采用写实的单反相机摄影风格，浅至中等景深，细节清晰自然，高动态范围阳光，营造出轻松的热带度假氛围，竖版 3:4 构图，无文字，无水印。
